fixture.description: User-submitted text is interpolated into innerHTML with no escaping or sanitization — a cross-site scripting (XSS) sink.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that renderComment writes the user-submitted `comment` into el.innerHTML without escaping or sanitizing, allowing HTML/script injection (XSS). It should recommend using textContent or sanitizing the input. Severity IMPORTANT or CRITICAL. FAIL if the XSS / unsanitized-innerHTML risk is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: Bugs & Security agent flags the unsanitized innerHTML assignment as XSS
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT dismiss it because the element type is a minimal stub
Does NOT require a specific framework's sanitizer
